about.title: À propos
about.contextFirstParagraph: Je suis Akul Ramasubban — étudiant en génie mécanique à Purdue University, passionné par le design intentionnel et les solutions d'ingénierie concrètes.
about.contextSecondParagraph: Ce portfolio interactif Windows XP vous permet d'explorer mon travail via une interface bureau nostalgique.
about.contextThirdParagraph: De la conception de batteries pour Purdue Electric Racing à la construction d'un chariot électrique à Bangalore, j'aime relever les défis d'ingénierie.
about.contextFourthParagraph: J'ai effectué des stages chez Ford Motor Company et Tredence Inc., et travaillé comme chercheur au labo ARIES et à l'équipe AI Racing de Purdue.
about.contextFifthParagraph: Windows XP est le système d'exploitation avec lequel j'ai grandi — ce portfolio lui rend hommage.
about.contextSixthParagraph: Ce projet a été construit avec Vue.js, Pinia, Vue Router et TailwindCSS.
about.contextSeventhParagraph: J'espère que vous apprécierez la visite !
about.helpFirst: Ce portfolio est un fork de UnMugViolet/portfolio — un grand merci à Paul Jaguin pour le concept original Windows XP.
about.helpSecond: L'API de Spotify alimente l'intégration du lecteur de musique.
about.helpThird: Construit avec Vite et déployé via Vercel.
about.helpFourth: Les images de Windows XP proviennent de l'Internet Archive.
about.helpFifth: Contactez-moi à aramasub{'@'}purdue.edu ou sur LinkedIn.

legal.title: Mentions légales
legal.firstParagraph: Ce site portfolio appartient à Akul Ramasubban. Tout le contenu est fourni à titre informatif.
legal.secondParagraph: Ce site est créé et maintenu par Akul Ramasubban.
legal.fourthParagraph: Ce site est hébergé via Vercel.
legal.fifthParagraph: Le Directeur de publication est : Akul Ramasubban.
legal.sixthParagraph: Pour toute question sur ce site, vous pouvez envoyer un message à l’adresse email suivante :

services.contactMessage: N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour discuter de votre projet et obtenir un devis personnalisé.

logma.contextFirstParagraph: Purdue Electric Racing (PER) is a student-run team that designs and builds a fully electric race car for Formula SAE Electric.
logma.contextSecondParagraph: As Senior Battery Advisor and Module Project Lead, I designed sleeker busbars to minimize module length using current and resistivity calculations, and increased bend radius on terminal busbars to reduce vertical height.
logma.contextThirdParagraph: I ensured optimal thermal management with TIM thickness analysis and spacer integration for uniform cooling, while developing Simulink-based Simscape models to simulate SOC, heat generation, and cell temperature distribution.
logma.goalFirst: Optimize busbar design for compact and efficient battery modules
logma.goalSecond: Improve terminal busbar bend radius for reduced vertical height
logma.goalThird: Design spacers and thermal interface materials for efficient heat transfer
logma.goalFourth: Develop Simscape battery models for SOC and thermal simulation
logma.goalFifth: Refine cooling solutions using simulation-validated designs
logma.goalSixth: Achieve more compact module, reducing weight and improving assembly

pangaia.contextFirstParagraph: Created a retrofitted waste pushcart with motors and battery to automate the lives of older workers in a local market in India, completed at age 16.
pangaia.contextSecondParagraph: Conducted analysis on road surfaces to calculate motor sizing and battery range requirements, and designed a custom steering rack and overall vehicle design.
pangaia.contextThirdParagraph: Worked under a $2000 budget from the local government to come up with a novel solution that is easily integratable into existing workflows.
pangaia.contextFourthParagraph: The finished prototype was donated to a local waste market for daily use.
pangaia.goalFirst: Build a functional electric pushcart for under $2000
pangaia.goalSecond: Analyze road surfaces for motor sizing and battery range
pangaia.goalThird: Design custom steering rack and overall vehicle layout
pangaia.goalFourth: Integrate motors and battery into existing pushcart frame
pangaia.goalFifth: Donate prototype to local waste market
pangaia.goalSixth: Create easily integratable solution for elderly workers
pangaia.tasksDoneFirst: Road surface analysis and motor sizing

clench.contextFirstParagraph: At Purdue's ARIES Lab, I designed a multi-axis robotic testbed with closed-loop motion control in ROS 2.
clench.contextSecondParagraph: The testbed uses encoder feedback and motor drivers via I2C communication.
clench.contextThirdParagraph: I ran experiments with bio-responsive materials generating electrical output under controlled conditions.
clench.contextFourthParagraph: I also built fixtures and data-acquisition firmware to analyze biosignals.
clench.goalThird: Integrate encoder feedback and I2C drivers

emc2.contextFirstParagraph: On the Purdue AI Racing team, I develop autonomous drone path-planning algorithms.
emc2.contextSecondParagraph: I implemented NRHDG optimization for multi-agent drones over dynamic maps in Python.
emc2.contextThirdParagraph: The work integrates plant models and LiDAR data in Simulink for track mapping.
emc2.contextFourthParagraph: I created PID control algorithms for rapid directional changes in simulations.
emc2.goalFirst: Implement NRHDG optimization for multi-agent drones
emc2.goalSecond: Integrate plant models with LiDAR in Simulink
emc2.goalThird: Create PID control for path planning

aidella.contextFirstParagraph: At Ford Motor Company, I worked on Forward Model Quality as a Product Development Intern.
aidella.contextSecondParagraph: I facilitated Six Sigma root-cause analysis for a faulty fuel-injector tip.
aidella.contextThirdParagraph: I improved model-based design using MagicDraw and mapped customer usage to refine test methods.
aidella.tasksDoneFirstDetails: Coordinated supplier containment to prevent field issues.
aidella.tasksDoneSecondDetails: Used MagicDraw to accelerate DFMEA development.
aidella.tasksDoneThirdDetails: Refined test methods for 20% quality improvement.
aidella.tasksDoneFourthDetails: Gemba walks and UAW operator efficiency improvements.
aidella.tasksDoneFifthDetailsSecond: Contributed to NHTSA recall response capability.

fanny-portfolio.contextFirstParagraph: Designed and built a custom phone-controlled mini-racecar from scratch using 3D printing and off-the-shelf components.
fanny-portfolio.contextSecondParagraph: 3D printed and tested the entire frame with a 5:1 gearing ratio and custom steering configuration with a dual motor setup to improve torque performance.
fanny-portfolio.contextThirdParagraph: Created a custom application on the Blynk portal to allow remote control of servo and motors for accurate steering and power delivery, adapting the entire system to fit within 10 inches for a 65-degree turning radius.
fanny-portfolio.goalFirst: 3D print and test full vehicle frame
fanny-portfolio.goalSecond: Achieve 5:1 gearing ratio for torque optimization
fanny-portfolio.goalThird: Design custom steering config with dual motor setup
fanny-portfolio.goalFourth: Build Blynk app for phone-based remote control
fanny-portfolio.goalFifth: Fit entire car system within 10 inches

homeserver.contextFirstParagraph: At Tredence Inc., I worked as a Data Science Intern analyzing supply chain and retail data.
homeserver.contextSecondParagraph: I used Python and SQL to identify trends, build regression models, and drive insights.
homeserver.goalSecond: Build regression models for supply chain analysis
homeserver.goalThird: Reduce costs for key customers by 15%

clippy.message: On dirait que tu apprécies ce portfolio ! Voudrais-tu soutenir le projet ?
